title: OmniLottie_server
description: Serverless Lottie generation from text, image, or video via OmniLottie. Runpod-ready.

input.name: OmniLottie model id or path
input.description: HuggingFace repo id for RunPod cached models, or a local path if you still use a volume

input.name: Processor model id or path
input.description: HuggingFace repo id for the Qwen processor, or a local path if you still use a volume

input.name: Enable dummy mode
input.description: Return a lightweight placeholder Lottie without loading large weights.
